table.name: stg_account_status
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT account_status.load_id, account_status.source_system, account_status.cadence, account_status.drop_date, account_status.ingested_at, account_status.status_date, account_status.status_date_raw, account_status.store_code_raw, account_status.store_code_norm, account_status.account_status_raw, account_status.account_status_norm, account_status.status_reason_raw, account_status.status_reason_norm FROM raw.account_status ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.status_date, CASE WHEN (base.status_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.status_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.status_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.status_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS status_date, base.status_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_code_norm), ''::text) AS store_code, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_code_raw), ''::text) AS store_code_raw, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw) IS NULL) THEN NULL::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw))) ~~ '%inactive%'::text) THEN 'inactive'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw))) ~~ '%suspend%'::text) THEN 'suspended'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw))) ~~ '%pending%'::text) THEN 'pending'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw))) ~~ '%active%'::text) THEN 'active'::text ELSE NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_status_norm, base.account_status_raw))), ''::text) END AS account_status, base.account_status_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.status_reason_norm), ''::text) AS status_reason, base.status_reason_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.status_date, casted.status_date_raw, casted.store_code, casted.store_code_raw, casted.account_status, casted.account_status_raw, casted.status_reason, casted.status_reason_raw, ((casted.status_date IS NULL) OR (casted.store_code IS NULL) OR (casted.account_status IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.load_id, casted.status_date, casted.store_code, casted.account_status) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.status_date, flags.status_date_raw, flags.store_code, flags.store_code_raw, flags.account_status, flags.account_status_raw, flags.status_reason, flags.status_reason_raw, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate FROM flags;

table.name: stg_dispensary_master
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT dispensary_master.load_id, dispensary_master.source_system, dispensary_master.cadence, dispensary_master.drop_date, dispensary_master.ingested_at, dispensary_master.as_of_date, dispensary_master.as_of_date_raw, dispensary_master.dispensary_id_raw, dispensary_master.dispensary_id_norm, dispensary_master.store_code_raw, dispensary_master.store_code_norm, dispensary_master.dispensary_name_raw, dispensary_master.dispensary_name_norm, dispensary_master.state_raw, dispensary_master.state_norm, dispensary_master.city_raw, dispensary_master.city_norm, dispensary_master.postal_code_raw, dispensary_master.postal_code_norm, dispensary_master.license_id_raw, dispensary_master.license_id_norm, dispensary_master.account_type_raw, dispensary_master.account_type_norm FROM raw.dispensary_master ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.as_of_date, CASE WHEN (base.as_of_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.as_of_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.as_of_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.as_of_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS as_of_date, base.as_of_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.dispensary_id_norm), ''::text) AS dispensary_id, base.dispensary_id_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_code_norm), ''::text) AS store_code, base.store_code_raw, base.dispensary_name_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.dispensary_name_norm), ''::text) AS dispensary_name, base.state_raw, CASE WHEN (base.state_norm IS NULL) THEN NULL::text ELSE upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.state_norm)) END AS state, base.city_raw, NULLIF(initcap(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.city_norm)), ''::text) AS city, base.postal_code_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.postal_code_norm), ''::text) AS postal_code, base.license_id_raw, NULLIF(upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.license_id_norm)), ''::text) AS license_id, base.account_type_raw, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(base.account_type_norm, base.account_type_raw) IS NULL) THEN NULL::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.account_type_norm, base.account_type_raw))) END AS account_type FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.as_of_date, casted.as_of_date_raw, casted.dispensary_id, casted.dispensary_id_raw, casted.store_code, casted.store_code_raw, casted.dispensary_name_raw, casted.dispensary_name, casted.state_raw, casted.state, casted.city_raw, casted.city, casted.postal_code_raw, casted.postal_code, casted.license_id_raw, casted.license_id, casted.account_type_raw, casted.account_type, ((casted.dispensary_id IS NULL) OR (casted.dispensary_name IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, ((casted.state IS NOT NULL) AND (length(casted.state) <> 2)) AS is_bad_state_code, ((casted.postal_code IS NOT NULL) AND (length(casted.postal_code) < 5)) AS is_bad_postal_code, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY COALESCE(casted.as_of_date, casted.drop_date), casted.dispensary_id) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.as_of_date, flags.as_of_date_raw, flags.dispensary_id, flags.dispensary_id_raw, flags.store_code, flags.store_code_raw, flags.dispensary_name_raw, flags.dispensary_name, flags.state_raw, flags.state, flags.city_raw, flags.city, flags.postal_code_raw, flags.postal_code, flags.license_id_raw, flags.license_id, flags.account_type_raw, flags.account_type, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_bad_state_code, flags.is_bad_postal_code, flags.is_duplicate_candidate FROM flags;

table.name: stg_finance_actuals
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT finance_actuals_summary.load_id, finance_actuals_summary.source_system, finance_actuals_summary.cadence, finance_actuals_summary.drop_date, finance_actuals_summary.ingested_at, finance_actuals_summary.month_start, finance_actuals_summary.month_start_raw, finance_actuals_summary.metric_name_norm, finance_actuals_summary.metric_name_raw, finance_actuals_summary.actual_amount, finance_actuals_summary.actual_amount_raw, finance_actuals_summary.currency_code_norm, finance_actuals_summary.currency_code_raw FROM raw.finance_actuals_summary ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, (date_trunc('month'::text, (COALESCE(base.month_start, CASE WHEN (base.month_start_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.month_start_raw)::date WHEN (base.month_start_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.month_start_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END))::timestamp with time zone))::date AS period_month, base.month_start_raw, base.metric_name_raw, NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.metric_name_norm)), ''::text) AS metric_name, COALESCE((base.actual_amount)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.actual_amount_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS actual_amount, base.actual_amount_raw, NULLIF(upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.currency_code_norm)), ''::text) AS currency_code, base.currency_code_raw FROM base ), mapped AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.period_month, casted.month_start_raw, casted.metric_name_raw, casted.metric_name, casted.actual_amount, casted.actual_amount_raw, casted.currency_code, casted.currency_code_raw, CASE WHEN (casted.metric_name IS NULL) THEN 'unknown'::text WHEN (casted.metric_name ~~ '%gross%sales%'::text) THEN 'gross_sales'::text WHEN (casted.metric_name ~~ '%net%sales%'::text) THEN 'net_sales'::text WHEN ((casted.metric_name ~~ '%cogs%'::text) OR (casted.metric_name ~~ '%cost%of%goods%'::text)) THEN 'cogs'::text WHEN (casted.metric_name ~~ '%gross%margin%'::text) THEN 'gross_margin'::text WHEN (casted.metric_name ~~ '%labor%cost%'::text) THEN 'labor_cost'::text ELSE 'unknown'::text END AS kpi_category FROM casted ), flags AS ( SELECT mapped.load_id, mapped.source_system, mapped.cadence, mapped.drop_date, mapped.ingested_at, mapped.period_month, mapped.month_start_raw, mapped.metric_name_raw, mapped.metric_name, mapped.actual_amount, mapped.actual_amount_raw, mapped.currency_code, mapped.currency_code_raw, mapped.kpi_category, (mapped.kpi_category = 'unknown'::text) AS is_unmapped_metric, ((mapped.period_month IS NULL) OR (mapped.metric_name IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key FROM mapped ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.period_month, flags.month_start_raw, flags.metric_name_raw, flags.metric_name, flags.actual_amount, flags.actual_amount_raw, flags.currency_code, flags.currency_code_raw, flags.kpi_category, flags.is_unmapped_metric, flags.is_missing_key FROM flags;

table.name: stg_finance_quarterly_actuals
table.viewSql: SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM finance_quarterly_actuals.quarter_id), ''::text) AS quarter_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM finance_quarterly_actuals.account_code), ''::text) AS account_code, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM finance_quarterly_actuals.department_code), ''::text) AS department_code, (finance_quarterly_actuals.actual_amount)::numeric(18,2) AS actual_amount, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM finance_quarterly_actuals.reporting_category), ''::text) AS reporting_category FROM raw.finance_quarterly_actuals;

table.name: stg_forecast_actuals_weekly
table.viewSql: SELECT (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.week_start_date), ''::text))::date AS week_start_date, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.store_code)) AS store_code, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.state)) AS state, TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.region) AS region, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.sku)) AS sku, TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.product_name) AS product_name, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.product_family)) AS product_family, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.channel)) AS channel, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_units), ''::text))::numeric AS forecast_units, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_units), ''::text))::numeric AS actual_units, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_net_sales), ''::text))::numeric AS forecast_net_sales, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_net_sales), ''::text))::numeric AS actual_net_sales, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.forecast_unit_price), ''::text))::numeric AS forecast_unit_price, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.actual_unit_price), ''::text))::numeric AS actual_unit_price, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.promo_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['true'::text, 't'::text, '1'::text, 'yes'::text, 'y'::text])) THEN true WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.promo_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['false'::text, 'f'::text, '0'::text, 'no'::text, 'n'::text])) THEN false ELSE NULL::boolean END AS promo_flag, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.stockout_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['true'::text, 't'::text, '1'::text, 'yes'::text, 'y'::text])) THEN true WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.stockout_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['false'::text, 'f'::text, '0'::text, 'no'::text, 'n'::text])) THEN false ELSE NULL::boolean END AS stockout_flag, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.is_partial_actual)) = ANY (ARRAY['true'::text, 't'::text, '1'::text, 'yes'::text, 'y'::text])) THEN true WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.is_partial_actual)) = ANY (ARRAY['false'::text, 'f'::text, '0'::text, 'no'::text, 'n'::text])) THEN false ELSE NULL::boolean END AS is_partial_actual, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.seasonality_label)) AS seasonality_label, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.business_event)) AS business_event, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM forecast_actuals_weekly.plan_version)) AS plan_version, forecast_actuals_weekly.loaded_at FROM raw.forecast_actuals_weekly;

table.name: stg_ghg_electricity_bills
table.viewSql: WITH source AS ( SELECT row_number() OVER () AS raw_row_id, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.bill_month, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.facility_id, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.facility_name, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.utility_provider, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.meter_number, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.usage_amount, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.usage_unit, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.invoice_amount_usd, ghg_electricity_bills_monthly.invoice_number FROM raw.ghg_electricity_bills_monthly ), cleaned AS ( SELECT source.raw_row_id, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month) ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month))::date WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month) ~ '^[A-Za-z]{3}-\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month), 'Mon-YYYY'::text) WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month) ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.bill_month), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END AS activity_month, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.facility_id), ''::text)) AS facility_id, TRIM(BOTH FROM source.facility_name) AS facility_name, TRIM(BOTH FROM source.utility_provider) AS utility_provider, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.meter_number), ''::text)) AS meter_number, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.usage_amount) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.usage_amount))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS activity_amount, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.usage_unit)) = ANY (ARRAY['kwh'::text, 'kw hrs'::text, 'kwhrs'::text, 'kilowatt hour'::text, 'kilowatt hours'::text])) THEN 'kwh'::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.usage_unit)) END AS activity_unit, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_amount_usd) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_amount_usd))::numeric(18,2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS invoice_amount_usd, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_number), ''::text)) AS invoice_number, 'Scope 2'::text AS scope, 'electricity_kwh'::text AS factor_type, 'electricity_bills'::text AS source_system FROM source ) SELECT cleaned.raw_row_id, cleaned.activity_month, cleaned.facility_id, cleaned.facility_name, cleaned.utility_provider, cleaned.meter_number, cleaned.activity_amount, cleaned.activity_unit, cleaned.invoice_amount_usd, cleaned.invoice_number, cleaned.scope, cleaned.factor_type, cleaned.source_system, (cleaned.activity_amount < (0)::numeric) AS has_negative_activity, (cleaned.facility_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_facility_id, (cleaned.activity_month IS NULL) AS has_invalid_activity_month FROM cleaned;

table.name: stg_ghg_emission_factors
table.viewSql: SELECT upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.factor_id)) AS factor_id, initcap(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.scope)) AS scope, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.factor_type)) AS factor_type, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.region)) AS region, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.activity_unit)) AS activity_unit, (ghg_emission_factors_reference.factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit)::numeric(18,6) AS factor_value_kg_co2e_per_unit, TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.source_authority) AS source_authority, (ghg_emission_factors_reference.effective_start)::date AS effective_start, (ghg_emission_factors_reference.effective_end)::date AS effective_end, TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.version) AS factor_version, CASE WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_emission_factors_reference.is_current)) = ANY (ARRAY['Y'::text, 'YES'::text, 'TRUE'::text, '1'::text])) THEN true ELSE false END AS is_current FROM raw.ghg_emission_factors_reference;

table.name: stg_ghg_facility_master
table.viewSql: SELECT upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.facility_id)) AS facility_id, TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.facility_name) AS facility_name, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.facility_type)) AS facility_type, TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.city) AS city, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.state_province)) AS state_province, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.country)) AS country, upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.grid_region)) AS grid_region, CASE WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_facility_master.active_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['Y'::text, 'YES'::text, 'TRUE'::text, '1'::text])) THEN true ELSE false END AS is_active, (ghg_facility_master.opened_date)::date AS opened_date FROM raw.ghg_facility_master;

table.name: stg_ghg_fuel_usage
table.viewSql: WITH source AS ( SELECT row_number() OVER () AS raw_row_id, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.activity_month, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.facility_id, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.fuel_type, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.activity_amount, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.activity_unit, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.vendor_name, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.invoice_number, ghg_fuel_usage_facility.cost_usd FROM raw.ghg_fuel_usage_facility ), normalized AS ( SELECT source.raw_row_id, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month) ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month))::date WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month) ~ '^[A-Za-z]{3}-\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month), 'Mon-YYYY'::text) WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month) ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_month), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END AS activity_month, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.facility_id), ''::text)) AS facility_id, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.fuel_type)) = ANY (ARRAY['natural gas'::text, 'natural_gas'::text])) THEN 'natural_gas'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.fuel_type)) = 'diesel'::text) THEN 'diesel'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.fuel_type)) = 'gasoline'::text) THEN 'gasoline'::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.fuel_type)) END AS fuel_type, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_amount) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_amount))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS activity_amount, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_unit)) = ANY (ARRAY['gal'::text, 'gallon'::text, 'gallons'::text])) THEN 'gallon'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_unit)) = ANY (ARRAY['therm'::text, 'therms'::text])) THEN 'therm'::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.activity_unit)) END AS activity_unit, TRIM(BOTH FROM source.vendor_name) AS vendor_name, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_number), ''::text)) AS invoice_number, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.cost_usd) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.cost_usd))::numeric(18,2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS cost_usd FROM source ), classified AS ( SELECT normalized.raw_row_id, normalized.activity_month, normalized.facility_id, normalized.fuel_type, normalized.activity_amount, normalized.activity_unit, normalized.vendor_name, normalized.invoice_number, normalized.cost_usd, 'Scope 1'::text AS scope, CASE WHEN ((normalized.fuel_type = 'natural_gas'::text) AND (normalized.activity_unit = 'therm'::text)) THEN 'natural_gas_therm'::text WHEN ((normalized.fuel_type = 'diesel'::text) AND (normalized.activity_unit = 'gallon'::text)) THEN 'diesel_gallon'::text WHEN ((normalized.fuel_type = 'gasoline'::text) AND (normalized.activity_unit = 'gallon'::text)) THEN 'gasoline_gallon'::text ELSE NULL::text END AS factor_type, CASE WHEN ((normalized.fuel_type = 'natural_gas'::text) AND (normalized.activity_unit <> 'therm'::text)) THEN true WHEN ((normalized.fuel_type = ANY (ARRAY['diesel'::text, 'gasoline'::text])) AND (normalized.activity_unit <> 'gallon'::text)) THEN true ELSE false END AS has_invalid_fuel_unit, 'fuel_usage'::text AS source_system FROM normalized ) SELECT classified.raw_row_id, classified.activity_month, classified.facility_id, classified.fuel_type, classified.activity_amount, classified.activity_unit, classified.vendor_name, classified.invoice_number, classified.cost_usd, classified.scope, classified.factor_type, classified.has_invalid_fuel_unit, classified.source_system, (classified.activity_amount < (0)::numeric) AS has_negative_activity, (classified.facility_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_facility_id, (classified.activity_month IS NULL) AS has_invalid_activity_month, (classified.factor_type IS NULL) AS has_unknown_fuel_type FROM classified;

table.name: stg_ghg_packaging_materials
table.viewSql: WITH source AS ( SELECT row_number() OVER () AS raw_row_id, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.invoice_month, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.facility_id, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.product_line_id, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.material_type, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.supplier_name, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.units_purchased, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.material_weight_kg, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.invoice_number, ghg_packaging_materials_procurement.cost_usd FROM raw.ghg_packaging_materials_procurement ), cleaned AS ( SELECT source.raw_row_id, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month) ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month))::date WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month) ~ '^[A-Za-z]{3}-\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month), 'Mon-YYYY'::text) WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month) ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_month), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END AS activity_month, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.facility_id), ''::text)) AS facility_id, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.product_line_id), ''::text)) AS product_line_id, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'paper'::text) THEN 'paper'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'plastic'::text) THEN 'plastic'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'glass'::text) THEN 'glass'::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) END AS material_type, TRIM(BOTH FROM source.supplier_name) AS supplier_name, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.units_purchased) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.units_purchased))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS units_purchased, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_weight_kg) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_weight_kg))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS activity_amount, 'kg'::text AS activity_unit, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.invoice_number), ''::text)) AS invoice_number, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.cost_usd) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.cost_usd))::numeric(18,2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS cost_usd, 'Scope 3'::text AS scope, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'paper'::text) THEN 'packaging_paper_kg'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'plastic'::text) THEN 'packaging_plastic_kg'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.material_type)) = 'glass'::text) THEN 'packaging_glass_kg'::text ELSE NULL::text END AS factor_type, 'packaging_materials'::text AS source_system FROM source ) SELECT cleaned.raw_row_id, cleaned.activity_month, cleaned.facility_id, cleaned.product_line_id, cleaned.material_type, cleaned.supplier_name, cleaned.units_purchased, cleaned.activity_amount, cleaned.activity_unit, cleaned.invoice_number, cleaned.cost_usd, cleaned.scope, cleaned.factor_type, cleaned.source_system, (cleaned.activity_amount < (0)::numeric) AS has_negative_activity, (cleaned.facility_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_facility_id, (cleaned.product_line_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_product_line_id, (cleaned.activity_month IS NULL) AS has_invalid_activity_month, (cleaned.factor_type IS NULL) AS has_unknown_material_type FROM cleaned;

table.name: stg_ghg_product_line_master
table.viewSql: SELECT upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_product_line_master.product_line_id)) AS product_line_id, TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_product_line_master.product_line_name) AS product_line_name, lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_product_line_master.product_family)) AS product_family, CASE WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM ghg_product_line_master.active_flag)) = ANY (ARRAY['Y'::text, 'YES'::text, 'TRUE'::text, '1'::text])) THEN true ELSE false END AS is_active FROM raw.ghg_product_line_master;

table.name: stg_ghg_shipping_miles
table.viewSql: WITH source AS ( SELECT row_number() OVER () AS raw_row_id, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.shipment_id, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.shipment_date, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.origin_facility_id, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.destination_state, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.product_line_id, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.shipping_mode, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.carrier, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.distance_miles, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.shipment_weight_lb, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.ton_miles, ghg_shipping_miles_logistics.freight_cost_usd FROM raw.ghg_shipping_miles_logistics ), cleaned AS ( SELECT source.raw_row_id, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_id), ''::text)) AS shipment_id, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date) ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date))::date WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date) ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END AS shipment_date, (date_trunc('month'::text, ( CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date) ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date))::date WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date) ~ '^\d{1,2}/\d{1,2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_date), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END)::timestamp with time zone))::date AS activity_month, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.origin_facility_id), ''::text)) AS facility_id, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.destination_state), ''::text)) AS destination_state, upper(NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.product_line_id), ''::text)) AS product_line_id, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipping_mode)) = 'truck'::text) THEN 'truck'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipping_mode)) = 'air'::text) THEN 'air'::text ELSE lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipping_mode)) END AS shipping_mode, TRIM(BOTH FROM source.carrier) AS carrier, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.distance_miles) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.distance_miles))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS distance_miles, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_weight_lb) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipment_weight_lb))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS shipment_weight_lb, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.ton_miles) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.ton_miles))::numeric(18,4) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS activity_amount, 'ton_mile'::text AS activity_unit, CASE WHEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.freight_cost_usd) ~ '^-?\d+(\.\d+)?$'::text) THEN (TRIM(BOTH FROM source.freight_cost_usd))::numeric(18,2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS freight_cost_usd, 'Scope 3'::text AS scope, CASE WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipping_mode)) = 'truck'::text) THEN 'freight_truck_ton_mile'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM source.shipping_mode)) = 'air'::text) THEN 'freight_air_ton_mile'::text ELSE NULL::text END AS factor_type, 'shipping_miles'::text AS source_system FROM source ) SELECT cleaned.raw_row_id, cleaned.shipment_id, cleaned.shipment_date, cleaned.activity_month, cleaned.facility_id, cleaned.destination_state, cleaned.product_line_id, cleaned.shipping_mode, cleaned.carrier, cleaned.distance_miles, cleaned.shipment_weight_lb, cleaned.activity_amount, cleaned.activity_unit, cleaned.freight_cost_usd, cleaned.scope, cleaned.factor_type, cleaned.source_system, (cleaned.activity_amount < (0)::numeric) AS has_negative_activity, (cleaned.facility_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_facility_id, (cleaned.product_line_id IS NULL) AS has_missing_product_line_id, (cleaned.shipment_date IS NULL) AS has_invalid_shipment_date, (cleaned.factor_type IS NULL) AS has_unknown_shipping_mode FROM cleaned;

table.name: stg_inventory_erp
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT inventory_erp_snapshot.load_id, inventory_erp_snapshot.source_system, inventory_erp_snapshot.cadence, inventory_erp_snapshot.drop_date, inventory_erp_snapshot.ingested_at, inventory_erp_snapshot.snapshot_date, inventory_erp_snapshot.snapshot_date_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.site_code_norm, inventory_erp_snapshot.site_code_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.sku, inventory_erp_snapshot.on_hand, inventory_erp_snapshot.on_hand_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.receipts, inventory_erp_snapshot.receipts_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.shipments, inventory_erp_snapshot.shipments_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.requested_units, inventory_erp_snapshot.requested_units_raw, inventory_erp_snapshot.backordered_units, inventory_erp_snapshot.backordered_units_raw FROM raw.inventory_erp_snapshot ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.snapshot_date, CASE WHEN (base.snapshot_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.snapshot_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.snapshot_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.snapshot_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS snapshot_date, base.snapshot_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.site_code_norm), ''::text) AS site_code, base.site_code_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.sku), ''::text) AS sku, COALESCE(base.on_hand, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.on_hand_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS on_hand, base.on_hand_raw, COALESCE(base.receipts, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.receipts_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS received_units, base.receipts_raw AS received_units_raw, COALESCE(base.shipments, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.shipments_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS shipped_units, base.shipments_raw AS shipped_units_raw, COALESCE(base.requested_units, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.requested_units_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS requested_units, base.requested_units_raw, COALESCE(base.backordered_units, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.backordered_units_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS backordered_units, base.backordered_units_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.snapshot_date, casted.snapshot_date_raw, casted.site_code, casted.site_code_raw, casted.sku, casted.on_hand, casted.on_hand_raw, casted.received_units, casted.received_units_raw, casted.shipped_units, casted.shipped_units_raw, casted.requested_units, casted.requested_units_raw, casted.backordered_units, casted.backordered_units_raw, CASE WHEN (casted.on_hand IS NULL) THEN NULL::integer ELSE GREATEST(casted.on_hand, 0) END AS on_hand_nonnegative, ((casted.on_hand IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.on_hand < 0)) AS is_negative_inventory, (COALESCE(GREATEST(casted.on_hand, 0), 0) > 0) AS in_stock_flag, ((casted.snapshot_date IS NULL) OR (casted.site_code IS NULL) OR (casted.sku IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.snapshot_date, flags.snapshot_date_raw, flags.site_code, flags.site_code_raw, flags.sku, flags.on_hand, flags.on_hand_raw, flags.received_units, flags.received_units_raw, flags.shipped_units, flags.shipped_units_raw, flags.requested_units, flags.requested_units_raw, flags.backordered_units, flags.backordered_units_raw, flags.on_hand_nonnegative, flags.is_negative_inventory, flags.in_stock_flag, flags.is_missing_key FROM flags;

table.name: stg_inventory_quarterly
table.viewSql: SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM inventory_quarterly_extract.quarter_id), ''::text) AS quarter_id, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM inventory_quarterly_extract.week_end_date), ''::text))::date AS week_end_date, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM inventory_quarterly_extract.warehouse_id), ''::text) AS warehouse_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM inventory_quarterly_extract.sku_id), ''::text) AS sku_id, (inventory_quarterly_extract.on_hand_units)::integer AS on_hand_units, (inventory_quarterly_extract.available_units)::integer AS available_units, (inventory_quarterly_extract.inventory_value)::numeric(18,2) AS inventory_value FROM raw.inventory_quarterly_extract;

table.name: stg_labor_payroll
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT labor_hours_payroll_export.load_id, labor_hours_payroll_export.source_system, labor_hours_payroll_export.cadence, labor_hours_payroll_export.drop_date, labor_hours_payroll_export.ingested_at, labor_hours_payroll_export.week_ending, labor_hours_payroll_export.week_ending_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.site_code_norm, labor_hours_payroll_export.site_code_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.department_norm, labor_hours_payroll_export.department_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.team_norm, labor_hours_payroll_export.team_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.hours_worked, labor_hours_payroll_export.hours_worked_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.ot_hours, labor_hours_payroll_export.ot_hours_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.employee_count, labor_hours_payroll_export.employee_count_raw, labor_hours_payroll_export.labor_cost, labor_hours_payroll_export.labor_cost_raw FROM raw.labor_hours_payroll_export ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.week_ending, CASE WHEN (base.week_ending_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.week_ending_raw)::date WHEN (base.week_ending_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.week_ending_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS week_ending, base.week_ending_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.site_code_norm), ''::text) AS site_code, base.site_code_raw, NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.department_norm)), ''::text) AS department, base.department_raw, CASE WHEN (base.team_norm IS NULL) THEN NULL::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.team_norm)) = 'fulfilment'::text) THEN 'fulfillment'::text ELSE NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.team_norm)), ''::text) END AS team, base.team_raw, COALESCE((base.hours_worked)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.hours_worked_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS hours_worked, base.hours_worked_raw, COALESCE((base.ot_hours)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.ot_hours_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS ot_hours, base.ot_hours_raw, COALESCE(base.employee_count, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.employee_count_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS employee_count, base.employee_count_raw, COALESCE((base.labor_cost)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.labor_cost_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS labor_cost, base.labor_cost_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.week_ending, casted.week_ending_raw, casted.site_code, casted.site_code_raw, casted.department, casted.department_raw, casted.team, casted.team_raw, casted.hours_worked, casted.hours_worked_raw, casted.ot_hours, casted.ot_hours_raw, casted.employee_count, casted.employee_count_raw, casted.labor_cost, casted.labor_cost_raw, ((casted.department IS NULL) OR (casted.team IS NULL)) AS is_missing_department_or_team FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.week_ending, flags.week_ending_raw, flags.site_code, flags.site_code_raw, flags.department, flags.department_raw, flags.team, flags.team_raw, flags.hours_worked, flags.hours_worked_raw, flags.ot_hours, flags.ot_hours_raw, flags.employee_count, flags.employee_count_raw, flags.labor_cost, flags.labor_cost_raw, flags.is_missing_department_or_team FROM flags;

table.name: stg_pos_transactions
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT pos_transactions_csv.load_id, pos_transactions_csv.source_system, pos_transactions_csv.cadence, pos_transactions_csv.drop_date, pos_transactions_csv.ingested_at, pos_transactions_csv.txn_id, pos_transactions_csv.txn_ts_raw, pos_transactions_csv.txn_ts_parsed, pos_transactions_csv.txn_date, pos_transactions_csv.store_code_raw, pos_transactions_csv.store_code_norm, pos_transactions_csv.product_sku_raw, pos_transactions_csv.product_sku_norm, pos_transactions_csv.qty_raw, pos_transactions_csv.qty, pos_transactions_csv.unit_price_raw, pos_transactions_csv.unit_price, pos_transactions_csv.discount_pct_raw, pos_transactions_csv.discount_pct, pos_transactions_csv.gross_amount_raw, pos_transactions_csv.gross_amount, pos_transactions_csv.net_amount_raw, pos_transactions_csv.net_amount FROM raw.pos_transactions_csv ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, base.txn_id, base.txn_ts_raw, base.txn_ts_parsed, base.txn_date, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_code_norm), ''::text) AS store_code, base.store_code_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.product_sku_norm), ''::text) AS sku, base.product_sku_raw, base.qty, base.qty_raw, base.unit_price, base.unit_price_raw, base.discount_pct, base.discount_pct_raw, base.gross_amount, base.gross_amount_raw, base.net_amount, base.net_amount_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.txn_id, casted.txn_ts_raw, casted.txn_ts_parsed, casted.txn_date, casted.store_code, casted.store_code_raw, casted.sku, casted.product_sku_raw, casted.qty, casted.qty_raw, casted.unit_price, casted.unit_price_raw, casted.discount_pct, casted.discount_pct_raw, casted.gross_amount, casted.gross_amount_raw, casted.net_amount, casted.net_amount_raw, ((casted.txn_id IS NULL) OR (casted.txn_date IS NULL) OR (casted.store_code IS NULL) OR (casted.sku IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.txn_id) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.txn_id, flags.txn_ts_raw, flags.txn_ts_parsed, flags.txn_date, flags.store_code, flags.store_code_raw, flags.sku, flags.product_sku_raw, flags.qty, flags.qty_raw, flags.unit_price, flags.unit_price_raw, flags.discount_pct, flags.discount_pct_raw, flags.gross_amount, flags.gross_amount_raw, flags.net_amount, flags.net_amount_raw, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate FROM flags;

table.name: stg_retail_account_sales_quarterly
table.viewSql: SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.quarter_id), ''::text) AS quarter_id, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.week_end_date), ''::text))::date AS week_end_date, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.dispensary_account_id), ''::text) AS dispensary_account_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.sku_id), ''::text) AS sku_id, (retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.units_sold)::integer AS units_sold, (retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.gross_sales)::numeric(18,2) AS gross_sales, (retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.discount_amount)::numeric(18,2) AS discount_amount, (retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract.net_sales)::numeric(18,2) AS net_sales FROM raw.retail_account_sales_quarterly_extract;

table.name: stg_sales_distributor
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT sales_distributor_extract.load_id, sales_distributor_extract.source_system, sales_distributor_extract.cadence, sales_distributor_extract.drop_date, sales_distributor_extract.ingested_at, sales_distributor_extract.sale_date, sales_distributor_extract.sale_date_raw, sales_distributor_extract.store_id_norm, sales_distributor_extract.store_id_raw, sales_distributor_extract.sku, sales_distributor_extract.product_name_norm, sales_distributor_extract.product_name_raw, sales_distributor_extract.channel_norm, sales_distributor_extract.channel_raw, sales_distributor_extract.qty, sales_distributor_extract.qty_raw, sales_distributor_extract.unit_list_price, sales_distributor_extract.unit_list_price_raw, sales_distributor_extract.discount_rate, sales_distributor_extract.discount_rate_raw, sales_distributor_extract.unit_net_price, sales_distributor_extract.unit_net_price_raw, sales_distributor_extract.gross_sales, sales_distributor_extract.gross_sales_raw, sales_distributor_extract.discount_amount, sales_distributor_extract.discount_amount_raw, sales_distributor_extract.net_sales, sales_distributor_extract.net_sales_raw, sales_distributor_extract.cogs, sales_distributor_extract.cogs_raw, sales_distributor_extract.orders, sales_distributor_extract.orders_raw, sales_distributor_extract.customers, sales_distributor_extract.customers_raw FROM raw.sales_distributor_extract ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.sale_date, CASE WHEN (base.sale_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.sale_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.sale_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.sale_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS sale_date, base.sale_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_id_norm), ''::text) AS store_code, base.store_id_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.sku), ''::text) AS sku, base.product_name_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.product_name_norm), ''::text) AS product_name, base.channel_raw, CASE WHEN (base.channel_norm IS NULL) THEN NULL::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)) ~~ '%retail%'::text) THEN 'retail'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)) ~~ '%wholesale%'::text) THEN 'wholesale'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)) ~~ '%distrib%'::text) THEN 'distributor'::text WHEN (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)) = ANY (ARRAY['retail'::text, 'wholesale'::text, 'distributor'::text])) THEN lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)) ELSE NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.channel_norm)), ''::text) END AS channel, COALESCE(base.qty, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.qty_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS qty, base.qty_raw, COALESCE((base.unit_list_price)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.unit_list_price_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS unit_list_price, base.unit_list_price_raw, COALESCE((base.discount_rate)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.discount_rate_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS discount_rate, base.discount_rate_raw, COALESCE((base.unit_net_price)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.unit_net_price_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS unit_net_price, base.unit_net_price_raw, COALESCE((base.gross_sales)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.gross_sales_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS gross_sales, base.gross_sales_raw, COALESCE((base.discount_amount)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.discount_amount_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS discount_amount, base.discount_amount_raw, COALESCE((base.net_sales)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.net_sales_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS net_sales, base.net_sales_raw, COALESCE((base.cogs)::numeric, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.cogs_raw), '[^0-9\.\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::numeric) AS cogs, base.cogs_raw, COALESCE(base.orders, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.orders_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS orders, base.orders_raw, COALESCE(base.customers, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.customers_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS customers, base.customers_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.sale_date, casted.sale_date_raw, casted.store_code, casted.store_id_raw, casted.sku, casted.product_name_raw, casted.product_name, casted.channel_raw, casted.channel, casted.qty, casted.qty_raw, casted.unit_list_price, casted.unit_list_price_raw, casted.discount_rate, casted.discount_rate_raw, casted.unit_net_price, casted.unit_net_price_raw, casted.gross_sales, casted.gross_sales_raw, casted.discount_amount, casted.discount_amount_raw, casted.net_sales, casted.net_sales_raw, casted.cogs, casted.cogs_raw, casted.orders, casted.orders_raw, casted.customers, casted.customers_raw, (((casted.gross_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.gross_sales < (0)::numeric)) OR ((casted.net_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.net_sales < (0)::numeric)) OR ((casted.discount_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.discount_amount < (0)::numeric)) OR ((casted.cogs IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.cogs < (0)::numeric)) OR ((casted.gross_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.net_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.net_sales > (casted.gross_sales + 0.01))) OR ((casted.gross_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.net_sales IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.discount_amount IS NOT NULL) AND (abs(((casted.net_sales + casted.discount_amount) - casted.gross_sales)) > 0.50))) AS is_bad_amount, ((casted.sale_date IS NULL) OR (casted.store_code IS NULL) OR (casted.sku IS NULL) OR (casted.channel IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.load_id, casted.sale_date, casted.store_code, casted.sku, casted.channel, COALESCE(casted.qty, '-1'::integer), COALESCE(casted.net_sales, (- (1)::numeric))) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.sale_date, flags.sale_date_raw, flags.store_code, flags.store_id_raw, flags.sku, flags.product_name_raw, flags.product_name, flags.channel_raw, flags.channel, flags.qty, flags.qty_raw, flags.unit_list_price, flags.unit_list_price_raw, flags.discount_rate, flags.discount_rate_raw, flags.unit_net_price, flags.unit_net_price_raw, flags.gross_sales, flags.gross_sales_raw, flags.discount_amount, flags.discount_amount_raw, flags.net_sales, flags.net_sales_raw, flags.cogs, flags.cogs_raw, flags.orders, flags.orders_raw, flags.customers, flags.customers_raw, flags.is_bad_amount, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate FROM flags;

table.name: stg_sku_distribution_status
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT sku_distribution_status.load_id, sku_distribution_status.source_system, sku_distribution_status.cadence, sku_distribution_status.drop_date, sku_distribution_status.ingested_at, sku_distribution_status.as_of_date, sku_distribution_status.as_of_date_raw, sku_distribution_status.store_code_raw, sku_distribution_status.store_code_norm, sku_distribution_status.sku_raw, sku_distribution_status.sku_norm, sku_distribution_status.distribution_status_raw, sku_distribution_status.distribution_status_norm, sku_distribution_status.status_reason_raw, sku_distribution_status.status_reason_norm FROM raw.sku_distribution_status ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.as_of_date, CASE WHEN (base.as_of_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.as_of_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.as_of_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.as_of_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS as_of_date, base.as_of_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.store_code_norm), ''::text) AS store_code, base.store_code_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.sku_norm), ''::text) AS sku, base.sku_raw, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(base.distribution_status_norm, base.distribution_status_raw) IS NULL) THEN NULL::text ELSE NULLIF(lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.distribution_status_norm, base.distribution_status_raw))), ''::text) END AS distribution_status, base.distribution_status_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.status_reason_norm, base.status_reason_raw)), ''::text) AS status_reason, base.status_reason_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.as_of_date, casted.as_of_date_raw, casted.store_code, casted.store_code_raw, casted.sku, casted.sku_raw, casted.distribution_status, casted.distribution_status_raw, casted.status_reason, casted.status_reason_raw, ((casted.as_of_date IS NULL) OR (casted.store_code IS NULL) OR (casted.sku IS NULL) OR (casted.distribution_status IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.load_id, casted.as_of_date, casted.store_code, casted.sku, casted.distribution_status) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.as_of_date, flags.as_of_date_raw, flags.store_code, flags.store_code_raw, flags.sku, flags.sku_raw, flags.distribution_status, flags.distribution_status_raw, flags.status_reason, flags.status_reason_raw, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate FROM flags;

table.name: stg_timeclock_punches
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT timeclock_punches.load_id, timeclock_punches.source_system, timeclock_punches.cadence, timeclock_punches.drop_date, timeclock_punches.ingested_at, timeclock_punches.punch_ts_parsed, timeclock_punches.punch_ts_raw, timeclock_punches.punch_date, timeclock_punches.employee_id, timeclock_punches.employee_id_raw, timeclock_punches.site_code_norm, timeclock_punches.site_code_raw, timeclock_punches.action_norm, timeclock_punches.action_raw FROM raw.timeclock_punches ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE((base.punch_ts_parsed)::timestamp with time zone, CASE WHEN (base.punch_ts_raw IS NULL) THEN NULL::timestamp with time zone WHEN (base.punch_ts_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}$'::text) THEN ((base.punch_ts_raw)::timestamp without time zone)::timestamp with time zone WHEN (base.punch_ts_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}\s+\d{2}:\d{2}$'::text) THEN to_timestamp(base.punch_ts_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI'::text) ELSE NULL::timestamp with time zone END) AS punch_ts, base.punch_ts_raw, COALESCE(base.punch_date, CASE WHEN (base.punch_ts_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}'::text) THEN ("left"(base.punch_ts_raw, 10))::date WHEN (base.punch_ts_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}'::text) THEN to_date("left"(base.punch_ts_raw, 10), 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS punch_date, base.punch_date AS punch_date_src, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.site_code_norm), ''::text) AS site_code, base.site_code_raw, COALESCE(base.employee_id, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.employee_id_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS employee_id, base.employee_id_raw, CASE WHEN (COALESCE(base.action_norm, base.action_raw) IS NULL) THEN NULL::text WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.action_norm, base.action_raw))) = ANY (ARRAY['IN'::text, 'CLOCKIN'::text, 'CLOCK_IN'::text, 'START'::text, 'PUNCHIN'::text, 'PUNCH_IN'::text])) THEN 'IN'::text WHEN (upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.action_norm, base.action_raw))) = ANY (ARRAY['OUT'::text, 'CLOCKOUT'::text, 'CLOCK_OUT'::text, 'END'::text, 'PUNCHOUT'::text, 'PUNCH_OUT'::text])) THEN 'OUT'::text ELSE NULLIF(upper(TRIM(BOTH FROM COALESCE(base.action_norm, base.action_raw))), ''::text) END AS action, base.action_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.punch_ts, casted.punch_ts_raw, casted.punch_date, casted.punch_date_src, casted.site_code, casted.site_code_raw, casted.employee_id, casted.employee_id_raw, casted.action, casted.action_raw, ((casted.punch_ts IS NULL) OR (casted.punch_date IS NULL) OR (casted.site_code IS NULL) OR (casted.employee_id IS NULL) OR (casted.action IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.load_id, casted.punch_ts, casted.site_code, casted.employee_id, casted.action) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate, ((casted.action IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.action <> ALL (ARRAY['IN'::text, 'OUT'::text]))) AS is_bad_action FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.punch_ts, flags.punch_ts_raw, flags.punch_date, flags.punch_date_src, flags.site_code, flags.site_code_raw, flags.employee_id, flags.employee_id_raw, flags.action, flags.action_raw, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate, flags.is_bad_action FROM flags;

table.name: stg_trade_adjustments
table.viewSql: SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.quarter_id), ''::text) AS quarter_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.adjustment_id), ''::text) AS adjustment_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.account_id), ''::text) AS account_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.adjustment_type), ''::text) AS adjustment_type, (trade_adjustments_extract.adjustment_amount)::numeric(18,2) AS adjustment_amount, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.adjustment_date), ''::text))::date AS adjustment_date, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM trade_adjustments_extract.reason_code), ''::text) AS reason_code FROM raw.trade_adjustments_extract;

table.name: stg_wholesale_account_sales_quarterly
table.viewSql: SELECT NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.quarter_id), ''::text) AS quarter_id, (NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.week_end_date), ''::text))::date AS week_end_date, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.wholesale_account_id), ''::text) AS wholesale_account_id, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.sku_id), ''::text) AS sku_id, (wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.cases_sold)::integer AS cases_sold, (wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.gross_sales)::numeric(18,2) AS gross_sales, (wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract.net_sales)::numeric(18,2) AS net_sales FROM raw.wholesale_account_sales_quarterly_extract;

table.name: stg_wms_shipments
table.viewSql: WITH base AS ( SELECT wms_shipments.load_id, wms_shipments.source_system, wms_shipments.cadence, wms_shipments.drop_date, wms_shipments.ingested_at, wms_shipments.ship_date, wms_shipments.ship_date_raw, wms_shipments.shipment_id_norm, wms_shipments.shipment_id_raw, wms_shipments.site_code_norm, wms_shipments.site_code_raw, wms_shipments.sku_norm, wms_shipments.sku_raw, wms_shipments.units_shipped, wms_shipments.units_shipped_raw, wms_shipments.carrier_norm, wms_shipments.carrier_raw FROM raw.wms_shipments ), casted AS ( SELECT base.load_id, base.source_system, base.cadence, base.drop_date, base.ingested_at, COALESCE(base.ship_date, CASE WHEN (base.ship_date_raw ~ '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$'::text) THEN (base.ship_date_raw)::date WHEN (base.ship_date_raw ~ '^\d{2}/\d{2}/\d{4}$'::text) THEN to_date(base.ship_date_raw, 'MM/DD/YYYY'::text) ELSE NULL::date END) AS ship_date, base.ship_date_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.shipment_id_norm), ''::text) AS shipment_id, base.shipment_id_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.site_code_norm), ''::text) AS site_code, base.site_code_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.sku_norm), ''::text) AS sku, base.sku_raw, COALESCE(base.units_shipped, (NULLIF(regexp_replace(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.units_shipped_raw), '[^0-9\-]+'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text), ''::text))::integer) AS units_shipped, base.units_shipped_raw, NULLIF(TRIM(BOTH FROM base.carrier_norm), ''::text) AS carrier, base.carrier_raw FROM base ), flags AS ( SELECT casted.load_id, casted.source_system, casted.cadence, casted.drop_date, casted.ingested_at, casted.ship_date, casted.ship_date_raw, casted.shipment_id, casted.shipment_id_raw, casted.site_code, casted.site_code_raw, casted.sku, casted.sku_raw, casted.units_shipped, casted.units_shipped_raw, casted.carrier, casted.carrier_raw, ((casted.ship_date IS NULL) OR (casted.site_code IS NULL) OR (casted.sku IS NULL)) AS is_missing_key, (count(*) OVER (PARTITION BY casted.load_id, casted.ship_date, casted.site_code, casted.sku, casted.shipment_id) > 1) AS is_duplicate_candidate, ((casted.units_shipped IS NOT NULL) AND (casted.units_shipped < 0)) AS is_negative_units, (casted.units_shipped IS NULL) AS is_missing_units FROM casted ) SELECT flags.load_id, flags.source_system, flags.cadence, flags.drop_date, flags.ingested_at, flags.ship_date, flags.ship_date_raw, flags.shipment_id, flags.shipment_id_raw, flags.site_code, flags.site_code_raw, flags.sku, flags.sku_raw, flags.units_shipped, flags.units_shipped_raw, flags.carrier, flags.carrier_raw, flags.is_missing_key, flags.is_duplicate_candidate, flags.is_negative_units, flags.is_missing_units FROM flags;
